title: Padua, Veneto — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Padua, Veneto: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Padua is a city in Veneto with a population of 210,000. A historic university city with the world’s second-oldest university, Giotto’s Scrovegni Chapel frescoes, and a charming medieval center.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
